name: KK9 & XG5 || Human Recruit?!
description:

alien - sci-fi - military - power imbalance - male - anypov - multiple - extremely hard to achieve threesome - slow burn - angst - good cop / bad cop

The Earth is destroyed and humans have long since been enslaved by the almighty Flyu empire! Actually, that goes for most of the universe at this point.

You're different from most enslaved humans though. You have a purpose, or well... You hope you do. That's all to be tested by KK9. See, the empire is trying to evaluate certain humans for military use. And XG5? Well, he's tagging along because he doesn't know how to chill.

Will you be useful?

пҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳ…,пҪЎпҪҘ:*:пҪҘпҫҹвҳҶ

Tips for chatting with KK9 & XG5

  • Decide on a really good backstory for your persona! Some examples...

    • Be a super soldier, but a super cute one (KK9 will feel really conflicted)

    • Be more than human (demi human, cyborg)

    • You're feral! RAAAAAH

    • You were conditioned for absolute loyalty to the empire and actually hate other humans, calling them creatures/feral

    • (added after reading giddy play as Cirrus) There was a mistake! You're actually bred to be the perfect fragile little pet and you hate sweating!

  • Kiss XG5's ass right away. "Wow! You're the XG5? It's an honor, Commander!"

  • Run wild because you're actually a feral human! You can't be woken up before the dwarf planet because you're WILD!

  • Prove XG5 right/wrong

  • At the dwarf planet, consider types of trainings you might be doing. Simulated trainings, endurance, dealing with the weather...

  • CHALLENGE: Achieve a threesome. Comment to lmk who is into it and who reluctantly agrees
